text: Network quality is solid. Coverage is good across EU. Pricing could be clearer — too many add-ons. Support was helpful when I had a billing question.
Network is reliable. Customer support wait times are long. Pricing transparency is poor. App is okay.
Best network in the US. Coverage is unmatched. Pricing is premium but you get what you pay for. Support was responsive.
Network quality is top tier. Pricing transparency could improve. Customer support is adequate. Best coverage in my area.
Good network. Coverage is solid. Pricing is competitive. Ease of use — app and billing — is decent. Balanced option.
Network is fine. Had billing issues — took 2 calls to resolve. Pricing transparency is lacking. Support was slow.
EU coverage is excellent. Roaming works well. Value for money is okay. Customer support could be faster.
Network quality is best in class. Coverage in rural areas is unmatched. Premium price but worth it. App is functional.
Good balance of network and price. Coverage is reliable. Ease of use is good. Support was helpful.
Network reliability is good. International roaming is a plus. Pricing transparency needs work. Overall solid.
Best network. Pricing is high. Customer support is okay. Value for money is debatable but coverage justifies it.
Switched from T-Mobile. Network is better. Pricing is fair. Ease of use — app, billing — is good. Happy with the switch.
Network is fine. Support took 45 minutes to reach. Pricing has hidden fees. Value for money is average.
Unbeatable coverage. Network quality is premium. Pay more but get the best. Support resolved an issue same day.
Reliable network. Coverage is good. Pricing transparency could improve. Ease of use is decent. Solid choice.
Good for EU travel. Roaming is seamless. Network quality is solid. Customer support is hit or miss.
Best network quality. Coverage is excellent. Pricing is premium. Support could be better. Worth it for reliability.
Network and coverage are good. Value for money is competitive. Ease of use is fine. Balanced provider.
EU coverage is strong. Network reliability is good. Pricing could be clearer. Overall positive experience.
Premium network. Best coverage. Worth the price for reliability. App is easy to use.
